metadata.title: Sneaking Through B Site for a Silent 2v1 Finish in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a sneaky B site flank where timing and calm aim secure a clean 2v1 win. How do you approach flanking in clutch moments? Share your best moves below!

Got any clutch flanks? Drop them in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
metadata.cta: Got any clutch flanks? Drop them in the comments!
